summary: All three round 2 findings addressed. test_flowcleanup_empties_response_body correctly runs the full production addon chain (GeoFixAddon + FlowCleanup), asserts len(body) == 0 with an explicit bug-fixing instruction in the assertion message — this is an appropriate negative regression gate for a documented production bug. The private API guard (hasattr + version comment) and the tracemalloc threshold comment are both in place. 7 tests pass, full suite 244 passed.

fixedFromRound2: Major: test_flowcleanup_empties_response_body added — full production addon chain, len(body)==0 assertion with regression gate message
Minor 1: hasattr(servers, '_instances') guard added with mitmproxy 10.x version comment and production deviation explanation
Minor 2: tracemalloc threshold comment updated — '100 flows × ~1KB = ~100KB payload + 50KB overhead = 150KB'
